content.problemStatement:
Baby, tell me, what's your motive? (Motive) 

What's your motive? 

What's your motive? (Ah) 

So tell me, what's your motive? (What's your motive?)

You are given an array AAA consisting of NNN positive integers.

In one operation, you have to:


Calculate the lcm and gcd of the array;
Multiply each element of the array by the calculated lcm, and divide each element of the array by the calculated gcd.
Formally, let AXA^{X}AX be the array after performing XXX operations, where A0=AA^{0} = AA0=A.

Let GGG denote the gcd of A(X−1)A^{(X - 1)}A(X−1) and LLL denote the lcm of A(X−1)A^{(X - 1)}A(X−1).

Then, AX=A(X−1)⋅LG=[A1(X−1)⋅LG,A2(X−1)⋅LG,…,AN(X−1)⋅LG]A^{X} = A^{(X - 1)} \cdot \frac{L}{G} = [A^{(X - 1)}_1 \cdot \frac{L}{G}, A^{(X - 1)}_2 \cdot \frac{L}{G}, \ldots, A^{(X - 1)}_N \cdot \frac{L}{G}]AX=A(X−1)⋅GL​=[A1(X−1)​⋅GL​,A2(X−1)​⋅GL​,…,AN(X−1)​⋅GL​].

You are given QQQ queries. Each query is represented an integer KKK.

Find the gcd and lcm of AKA^{K}AK modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.


Input Format

The first line will contain a single integer NNN, denoting the number of integers in AAA.
The second line will contain NNN positive integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​, denoting the integers in AAA.
The third line will contain a single integer QQQ, denoting the number of queries.
The next QQQ lines each will contain a single integer KKK, denoting the number of operations to perform.


Output Format
For each query, output the gcd and lcm of AKA^{K}AK, modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
